variants: Zalmai Feroz currently resides in Cloudvale Market, where he develops his career in broadcasting. His journey began in Copperhill Bluffs, the town of his birth, and led him to Vale of Branches College, an institution that shaped his professional approach. Now working at Quartz Lantern Broadcast, Zalmai excels in creating content articulated through Filipino sentences. His background and education underpin his work, enabling him to make meaningful contributions to the media landscape.
